title: The Davy Back Fight Challenge
description: Zoro and Sanji push through Foxy’s cheating and give the crew a chance to reclaim Chopper.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene focuses on Luffy, Foxy, Nami, Hamburg, Usopp. Zoro and Sanji push through Foxy’s cheating and give the crew a chance to reclaim Chopper.

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: Pufu Fufu Fufu Fufu Fufu Fufu Fufuru!

dialogue.speaker: Hamburg
dialogue.text: Our Groggy monsters chose to ball first!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Yo, Ball Guy. Go stand there!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Zoro-- Sanji-- go kick their ass!!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: You have to win Chopper back!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Our team is unbelievable in the ring!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You can inter-fere in this game, too?!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It's all up to personal standards.

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: By the way, what's with your team?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: IMPOS-SIBLE! I won fair and square!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Shut the hell up. I'm talking about

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Are you done yet? Decide already!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Yup. You look like the Prince...

summary: Zoro and Sanji push through Foxy’s cheating and give the crew a chance to reclaim Chopper.
